citations.reason: eval, citation, freshness, confidence, approval, safety, and external-use gates
Phase 2 completion and Phase 3 readiness witness

approval.reason: Partner-facing, investor-facing, deployment, and repo-write actions require explicit approval outside this release witness.

nextActions.validation: record artifact-specific approval before partner, investor, deployment, or publication use

externalUse.reason: Partner-facing, investor-facing, deployment, and repo-write actions require explicit approval outside this release witness.

gates.label: Required source witnesses are green
gates.failureMode: Release cannot pass when any upstream witness is not ok.

gates.label: Golden strategic query eval passes
gates.failureMode: Release cannot pass when strategic retrieval quality regresses.

gates.label: Decision Room answers have citations
gates.failureMode: Release cannot pass when high-value answers lack at least three citations.

gates.label: Decision Room answers use fresh evidence
gates.failureMode: Release cannot pass when high-value answers cite stale evidence.

gates.label: Unsupported claim warnings are zero
gates.failureMode: Release cannot pass when strategic answers include unsupported claims.

gates.label: High-value answers meet confidence floor
gates.failureMode: Release cannot pass when answer confidence drops below floor.

gates.label: Execution actions preserve approval boundaries

evidence.reason: draft-only approval and release gate evidence

gates.failureMode: Release cannot pass when draft actions can cross write, external, or deploy boundaries without approval.

gates.label: Partner brief remains internal draft and approval-gated

evidence.reason: partner brief claim, freshness, and approval-boundary evaluation

gates.failureMode: Release cannot pass when partner narratives can cross external-use boundaries without explicit approval.

gates.label: SIGNAL and MPR relation evidence is explicit
gates.failureMode: Release cannot pass when repo-level agentic maturity evidence is missing or graph/RAG/MCP readiness regresses.

gates.label: Safety and release-gate doctrine is linked
gates.failureMode: Release cannot pass without a documented safety and release-gate doctrine.

citations.reason: Phase 2 completion gates and Phase 3 readiness

approval.reason: Read-only resource. No repo write, ticket creation, deployment, publication, partner contact, or external sharing is authorized.

externalUse.reason: Phase 2 completion only authorizes internal draft use. Partner-facing, investor-facing, deployment, and repo-write actions still require explicit approval.

gates.label: Graph, RAG, MCP, and eval configs are restored across the fleet
gates.failureMode: Phase 2 cannot close while any real repo lacks complete graph/RAG/MCP/eval config readiness.

gates.label: Typed ecosystem graph snapshot covers every real repo
gates.failureMode: Phase 2 cannot close without a complete typed graph snapshot and zero graph blockers.

gates.label: Unified query service passes golden strategic questions
gates.failureMode: Phase 2 cannot close while strategic retrieval questions fail their deterministic eval.

gates.label: Observatory has current fleet truth and commercial evidence coverage
gates.failureMode: Phase 2 cannot close unless the Observatory can summarize readiness, blockers, movement, and commercial evidence for every real repo.

gates.label: Decision Room answers pass citation, freshness, confidence, and unsupported-claim gates
gates.failureMode: Phase 2 cannot close while strategic answers contain unsupported claims, stale evidence warnings, or low confidence.

gates.label: SIGNAL and MPR relation evidence is explicit for every real repo
gates.failureMode: Phase 2 cannot close unless every real repo has generated SIGNAL evidence and an explicit MPR relation.

gates.label: Execution Studio has no remaining draft actions or approval-pending work
gates.failureMode: Phase 2 cannot close while valid draft actions remain unresolved or approval-pending.

gates.label: Partner brief remains internal-only and approval-gated
gates.failureMode: Phase 2 cannot close if partner/investor-facing narratives can cross the external-use boundary without explicit approval.

gates.label: Internal draft release gates pass with external use blocked
gates.failureMode: Phase 2 cannot close unless the release-gate bundle is green and external use remains blocked.

gates.label: Full Kaleidoscope operating loop is green
gates.failureMode: Phase 2 cannot close unless the full ordered stage chain passes locally.

phase3Readiness.why: SIGNAL L3 remains capped until durable traces, eval sinks, rollback evidence, and learning-loop evidence exist.
The current product is generated evidence and reports; Phase 3 should turn Observatory, Decision Room, Signal Lab, and Execution Studio into API/UI surfaces.
Partner proof packets can now be assembled from evidence, but each external artifact still needs explicit approval.
